issue: GitHub Actions Static source/resource audit failed because tc4_stage161_research_note_grid_parity_audit.py only accepted hard-coded older versions 1.98.0 or 2.00.0 and rejected current Stage204 version 2.04.0.
fixes: Replaced hard-coded Stage161 build.gradle version literal check with semantic version parsing.
Stage161 audit now accepts any project version >= 1.61.0 while still checking the actual Stage161 research-note grid parity tokens.
Preserved Stage204 version 2.04.0 and resource pack metadata fix.
